message:
fix(vfs): add .into() casts for macOS i16 lock constants

On macOS, libc::F_RDLCK/F_WRLCK/F_UNLCK are i16 while on Linux
they are i32. Add .into() at all 9 call sites passing these constants
to posix_lock()/posix_getlk() which expect i32, and wrap both sides
of the comparison on the check_reserved_lock return in i32::from()
for cross-platform consistency.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
